bugs.summary: The proposed patch discards normalized structured locations by replacing `locationsOf(finding)` with an empty array.
bugs.impact: Deep-review findings lose line/range/symbol identity even when upstream reviewers provided locations, causing localization and answer-key scoring failures; a separate `file` field may still survive for some findings.

requiredEvidence.quote: Identity evidence (file/line/symbol) must survive the LLM reduce stage

acceptableFixes: Preserve normalized file/line location fields through partition/report formatting.
Add a regression check that final findings retain machine-readable locations.
mustNotSay: This is only a cosmetic formatting issue.
All file identity is necessarily lost even when the separate `file` field survives.

mustAvoidClaims: Using prior A/B run notes as evidence.

difficulty.rationale: Provider reviews judged this objectively useful but likely easy because the changed line and nearby invariant comment are direct. Keep as calibration/regression unless later variant is made subtler.

approval.notes: Calibration saturated: all arms scored 1.0. Keep only as easy regression/calibration; do not lock as primary discriminating task.
